title: Link to specific board views from main menu
excerpt: I would like to embed a specific board view as a page link that appears in the left-side main menu.  I tried to embed on a dashboard using the embed everything widget but it is blocked.  Also even if it was not blocked y…

posts.author: shaun.mclean (Shaun McLean)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to embed a specific board view as a page link that appears in the left-side main menu. I tried to embed on a dashboard using the embed everything widget but it is blocked. Also even if it was not blocked you would end with the left menu and all other navigation being duplicated.

It would great to have and option when you click the workspace ‘Add’ link to select a view. The reason for this is because some of our boards have more than 5 views and it would be nice to have direct links to specific views from the main menu.

posts.author: LadyPenelope (Danika Jarrett)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m surprised this isn’t more widely requested - we need to add reference to some central documents from within many workspaces using the left-hand menu. I don’t want to replicate the documents as it would be impossible to control/update them centrally and this is a problem for compliance. What we need as a feature is to be able to add hyperlinks to the left-hand menu.
